<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_from_oseno.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Minakuchino Shrine (Q135041299) | native_name = 湊口神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Minakuchino Shrine (Q135041299) | coordinates = {{coord|34.322331|134.728221}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Minakuchino Shrine'''|湊口神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awaji Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Minakuchino Shrine (Q135041299) | native_name = 湊口神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Minakuchino Shrine (Q135041299) | coordinates = {{coord|34.322331|134.728221}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Minakuchino Shrine'''|湊口神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awaji Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Minakuchino Shrine (Q135041299) | native_name = 湊口神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Minakuchino Shrine (Q135041299) | coordinates = {{coord|34.322331|134.728221}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Minakuchino Shrine'''|湊口神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awaji Province]].
